subject: Wimpod on open ground, multiple legs spread, low to the earth
description: Wimpod is shown in a low, skittery pose on open ground, its small purple bug-crustacean body compact and its many thin legs spread wide. The viewpoint is slightly low angle, giving the small creature a little presence. The background opens into a grassy outdoor environment with a pale sky and soft clouds; what appears to be a moon or bright light source is visible in the upper right. The overall impression is of a timid, ground-hugging creature caught in motion — consistent with the flavor text describing a nature-cleaner that scurries near its nest.
foreground: Wimpod, small purple multi-legged bug-crustacean, low to ground, legs spread
background: grassy outdoor ground, open sky, clouds, moon or light source
emotion: skittish, alert — body low, legs spread as if ready to flee
